pages.title: Climate change
pages.excerpt: Present-day climate change includes both global warming—the ongoing increase in global average temperature—and its wider effects on Earth's climate system
pages.description: Human-caused changes to climate on Earth

pages.title: Climate change denial
pages.excerpt: Climate change denial (also global warming denial) is a form of science denial characterized by rejecting, refusing to acknowledge, disputing, or fighting
pages.description: Denial of the scientific consensus on climate change

pages.title: Climate
pages.excerpt: studying biological diversity and how climate change affects it. The major classifications in Thornthwaite's climate classification are microthermal, mesothermal
pages.description: Long-term weather pattern of a region
